mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, avatar, email, bio, role, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, nickname, avatar, email, bio, role) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{nickname}, ''), #{username}), COALESCE(#{avatar}, ''), #{email}, COALESCE(#{bio}, ''), COALESCE(#{role}, 'USER') )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = COALESCE(#{nickname}, nickname), email = COALESCE(#{email}, email), bio = COALESCE(#{bio}, bio), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET avatar = #{avatar}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.post_id, r.user_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username) AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar, u.role AS author_role, r.parent_reply_id, r.content, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, p.title AS post_title, CASE WHEN length(p.content) > 80 THEN substring(p.content from 1 for 80) || '...' ELSE p.content END AS post_content_preview, b.id AS board_id, b.name AS board_name, b.color_hex AS board_color_hex, CASE WHEN r.parent_reply_id IS NULL THEN 'post' ELSE 'reply' END AS reference_type, CASE WHEN r.parent_reply_id IS NULL THEN p.id ELSE r.parent_reply_id END AS reference_id, CASE WHEN r.parent_reply_id IS NULL THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(pu.nickname, ''), pu.username) WHEN pr.id IS NULL OR pr.status = 0 THEN '已移除' ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(pru.nickname, ''), pru.username) END AS reference_author_name, CASE WHEN r.parent_reply_id IS NULL AND length(p.content) > 80 THEN substring(p.content from 1 for 80) || '...' WHEN r.parent_reply_id IS NULL THEN p.content WHEN pr.id IS NULL OR pr.status = 0 THEN '该评论已移除' WHEN length(pr.content) > 80 THEN substring(pr.content from 1 for 80) || '...' ELSE pr.content END AS reference_content_preview, '/posts/' || r.post_id AS reference_href FROM replies r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id JOIN posts p ON p.id = r.post_id JOIN users pu ON pu.id = p.user_id JOIN boards b ON b.id = p.board_id LEFT JOIN replies pr ON pr.id = r.parent_reply_id LEFT JOIN users pru ON pru.id = pr.user_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 AND b.status = 1 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
